site.name: Bright Smile Dental Clinic
site.description: Neighborhood dental clinic in Makati with online booking, family dentistry, and a friendly front desk team.

paragraphs: Bright Smile is a Makati dental clinic focused on comfortable visits and clear communication.
Book online, get email confirmations, and manage appointments without long phone waits.
From cleanings to cosmetic work, our team treats every patient like a neighbor.
copy.short: Modern dental care in Makati with online booking.
copy.medium: Visit a clinic built for busy professionals — online scheduling, friendly staff, and quality care.
copy.long: Bright Smile Dental Clinic offers general, cosmetic, and family dentistry in the heart of Makati. Our front desk confirms bookings quickly and our dentists take time to explain every treatment option.
copy.quote: Fast booking, clean clinic, and the dentist was very gentle. Will come back for my next cleaning.

team.name: Dr. Ana Reyes
team.bio: General and cosmetic dentistry with 12 years of experience.

testimonials.text: Very professional and the online booking actually worked smoothly.
testimonials.author: Carla R.

testimonials.text: Great for working folks — early hours and quick appointments.
testimonials.author: Mark T.
